policy.reason: The workspace is disk constrained. Historical binary continuation checkpoints are not required to resume the current G1 run; their JSON probe receipts and this manifest preserve the decision record.

checkpoint_write_gate.effect: Future weak descent probes are retained as JSON diagnostics only and must not write a final checkpoint unless they clear this floor.

cleanup_scope.deleted_checkpoint_pattern: implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/**/*_final_checkpoint.npz except current frontier, plus superseded non-final cleanup checkpoint mgt_shell_free_component_state_cleanup_frontier_checkpoint.npz
